name: Spinach and Apple Salad w/ Bacon Dressing
recipeIngredient: 10 oz fresh spinach -- torn into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place spinach in a large bowl.
2. Cook bacon in a large skillet over medium-high heat until crisp. Remove to paper towels to drain. Discard all but 3 tablespoons drippings from the skillet.
3. Add oil to the drippings in the skillet and heat. Add onion; cook until tender, about 3 minutes.
4. Stir in vinegar, mustard, sugar, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil.
5. Remove from heat. Add apple to spinach. Pour hot dressing over spinach and apple; toss well to coat.
6. Crumble bacon and sprinkle over salad. Serve immediately.
